auth.err_username: Username: 3–32 characters, letters and numbers only.

boot.features: Manage per-game cheats, explore and apply community themes, back up and restore your saves to the cloud (FOR FREE!!!), install mods and keep an eye on system status — all in one app.

settings.restart_hint: Language changes apply when you restart the app.

cheats.title: Cheats
cheats.none: No cheats available for this game.
cheats.error_network: Download failed — check your connection and try again.
cheats.fallback: No cheats for this version; using the previous version's.
cheats.saved: Cheats saved — applied on the game's next boot.
cheats.save_failed: Couldn't write to the SD card.
cheats.apply_body:
Cheats are only loaded when the game STARTS.

Close the game completely (returning to the Home menu isn't enough) and open it again for them to take effect.

If they still don't work, enable the cheat via an overlay (e.g. EdiZon).
cheats.apply_body_reboot:
I enabled automatic cheat activation in Atmosphère.

Reboot the console ONCE for the setting to take effect. After that, just open the game — the cheats you enable here will already be active.

(If you'd rather not reboot now, enable the cheat manually via an overlay like EdiZon.)

tls.insecure_warning: Certificate verification unavailable — connection is not secure

help.cheats:
Cheats for this game.

The list is downloaded from the cheats database for your exact game version. Tap a cheat to toggle it on or off, then press X to save. Enabled cheats are applied by Atmosphère the next time you launch the game (hold L while booting it to open the cheat menu).

If nothing shows up, there are no cheats for this game/version yet.
help.mods:
Mods for this game.

Use "Import from SD" to install a .zip/.7z/.rar you dropped in the mods _incoming folder, or "Get mods" to browse GameBanana. Only one mod can be active per game at a time — toggle the one you want. Uninstall removes a mod from the SD card.

Mods are applied via Atmosphère's LayeredFS the next time you launch the game.
help.saves:
Save backups for this game.

Back up copies your current in-game save to the SD card. Restore writes a chosen backup back over your save — the running game must be closed first. The history list shows every backup with its date. If you're signed in, saves can also sync to the cloud.
help.cheats_list:
Pick a game to manage its cheats.

This lists the games installed on your console. Choose one to download and toggle cheats for it. Cheats are applied by Atmosphère when you launch the game.
help.mods_list:
Pick a game to manage its mods.

This lists the games installed on your console. Choose one to import, download or enable mods for it. Mods are applied via Atmosphère's LayeredFS when you launch the game.
help.saves_list:
Pick a game to back up or restore its save.

This lists the games installed on your console with the date of their last backup. Choose one to copy its save to the SD card (or cloud) and restore it later.

catalog.empty: This source has no games to show.

sources.empty_body: Add a content server URL or browse local files on your SD card to get started. Nothing is enabled by default.

sources.error_too_large: This source's index is too large to load safely.

sources.remove_confirm: Remove this source? Its saved config and cached catalog will be deleted from this console.
